traces.question: How has the proportion of empirical methods to conduct (systematic literature) reviews, so-called secondary research, evolved over time?
traces.extracted_query: SELECT ?year ?method_type ?method_typeLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paper_count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ; orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 ; orkgp:P135046 ?venue ; orkgp:P56008 ?data_collection . ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name . ?data_collection rdfs:label ?dc_label ; orkgp:P1005 ?dc_method . ?dc_method orkgp:P94003 ?method_type . OPTIONAL { ?method_type rdfs:label ?method_typeLabel . } FILTER(?dc_label != "no collection"^^xsd:string) FILTER(?venue_name = "IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"^^xsd:string) } GROUP BY ?year ?method_type ?method_typeLabel ORDER BY ?year ?method_typeLabel

traces.question: What empirical methods are used to conduct integrative and interpretive (systematic literature) reviews, so-called secondary research?
traces.raw_model_output:
SELECT DISTINCT ?methodName
WHERE {
  ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution .
  ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution .
  ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName .
  ?contribution pgmr:data_collection ?dataCollection .
  ?dataCollection pgmr:method ?dataCollectionMethod .
  ?dataCollectionMethod pgmr:method_name ?methodName .
  ?contribution pgmr:research_type ?researchType .
  ?researchType pgmr:secondary_research ?secondaryResearch .
  ?secondaryResearch pgmr:systematic_literature_review ?systematicLiteratureReview .
  ?systematicLiteratureReview pgmr:interpretive ?interpretive .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"))
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?interpretive)) IN ("true", "yes", "1"))
}
ORDER BY ?methodName

traces.question: Which papers report a research question but no question type?
traces.extracted_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P37330 ?researchQuestion . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?researchQuestion orkgp:P41928 ?anyQuestionType . } OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

traces.question: Which papers report at least one subquestion but no question type for that subquestion?
traces.extracted_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P37330 ?researchQuestion . ?researchQuestion orkgp:P57000 ?subquestion . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?subquestion orkgp:P41928 ?anySubquestionType . } OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

traces.question: Which papers report research data with a data type but without any url?
traces.raw_model_output:
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel
WHERE {
  ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution .
  ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution .
  ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName .
  ?contribution pgmr:data_collection ?dataCollection .
  ?dataCollection pgmr:data ?researchData .
  ?researchData pgmr:data_type ?dataType .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"))
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?researchData pgmr:url ?anyUrl . }
}
ORDER BY ?paperLabel
traces.extracted_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dataCollection . ?dataCollection orkgp:DATA ?researchData . ?researchData orkgp:P7055 ?dataType . OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?researchData orkgp:url ?anyUrl . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel
traces.gold_sparql:
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel ?researchData ?dataType ?dataTypeLabel
WHERE {
    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 ;
                    orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
    ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name .

    ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dataCollection .
    ?dataCollection rdfs:label ?dc_label .
    ?dataCollection orkgp:DATA ?researchData .
    ?researchData orkgp:P7055 ?dataType .

    ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
    ?dataType rdfs:label ?dataTypeLabel .

    FILTER NOT EXISTS {
        ?researchData orkgp:url ?url .
    }
    FILTER(?dc_label != "no collection"^^xsd:string)
    FILTER(?venue_name = "IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"^^xsd:string)
}
ORDER BY ?paperLabel ?dataTypeLabel

  ?dataAnalysis pgmr:inferential_statistics ?inferentialStatistics .
  ?inferentialStatistics pgmr:hypothesis ?hypothesis .
  ?hypothesis pgmr:hypothesis_statement ?hypothesisStatement .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"))
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?hypothesis pgmr:hypothesis_type ?anyHypothesisType . }
}
ORDER BY ?paperLabel
traces.extracted_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName . ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?dataAnalysis . ?dataAnalysis orkgp:P56043 ?inferentialStatistics . ?inferentialStatistics orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis . ?hypothesis orkgp:P56046 ?hypothesisStatement . OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?hypothesis orkgp:P41703 ?anyHypothesisType . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

traces.question: How many reported subquestions does each paper have?
traces.extracted_query: SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?subquestion) AS ?number_of_reported_subquestions) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 ; orkgp:P135046 ?venue ; orkgp:P37330 ?research_question . ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name . ?research_question orkgp:P57000 ?subquestion . FILTER(?venue_name = "IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"^^xsd:string) } GROUP BY ?paper ?paperLabel ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_reported_subquestions) ?paperLabel

traces.question: In which publication years were papers that reported both qualitative and quantitative data published?

  ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution .
  ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution .

  ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName .
  ?paper pgmr:publication_year ?year .
  ?contribution pgmr:data_collection ?dataCollection .
  ?dataCollection pgmr:data ?researchData .
  ?researchData pgmr:data_type ?dataType .
  ?dataType pgmr:qualitative ?qualitative .
  ?dataType pgmr:quantitative ?quantitative .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venueName)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference"))
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?qualitative)) IN ("true", "yes", "1"))
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?quantitative)) IN ("true", "yes", "1"))
}
ORDER BY ?year

traces.question: Which papers published after 2018 reported both recall and precision but no accuracy?
traces.raw_model_output:
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel
WHERE {
  ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution .
  ?contribution a pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution .
  ?contribution pgmr:venue_serie ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName .
  ?paper pgmr:publication_year ?year .
  ?contribution pgmr:data_analysis ?dataAnalysis .
  ?dataAnalysis pgmr:machine_learning ?machineLearning .
  ?machineLearning pgmr:metric ?metric .
  ?metric pgmr:recall ?recall .
  ?metric pgmr:precision ?precision .
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
